title: Static Pods — What's next
text:
Learn how to
create static Pods
.
Learn about
Kubernetes components
and how the control plane uses static Pods.
Learn about
DaemonSets
as an alternative to static Pods.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
